name: tuneslam-ai
description: TuneSlam – collaborative, real-time, community-driven Spotify queues

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n backend,admin,user,player -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:player"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace @tuneslam/admin run build && npm --workspace @tuneslam/user run build && npm --workspace @tuneslam/player run build
